title: Colocated Component Spec
description: Hand-authored source of truth, colocated beside each component as <Component>.spec.json. This is the ONLY file a developer/agent edits for design<->code metadata. The aggregate registry index (component-index.json) is GENERATED from these and must never be hand-edited.

$schema.description: Relative path to this schema for editor validation, e.g. '../../design-system/component-spec.schema.json' (depth varies for nested views).

name.description: PascalCase. MUST match the .svelte component AND the Figma component name. This string is the sync key across Figma, code, and the generated index.

description.description: One line. Used in autodocs and by the AI to disambiguate Figma matches.

status.description: Lifecycle of the code<->design link. (No 'code-connected' tier — Code Connect intentionally not used; it requires a paid Figma Org plan.)

nodeId.description: Figma node id of the component/component-set, e.g. '1234:567'.

url.description: Frame URL consumed by Storybook addon-designs. Empty + status<figma-linked until known.

lastSyncedHash.description: Structural hash of the Figma node at last sync, COMPUTED BY OUR TOOLING (Figma exposes no per-node hash). The MCP/sync tool recomputes the live hash and compares to this to detect drift.

props.description: Public prop/variant contract. Compared against Figma component properties to detect drift.

options.description: Allowed values when type is enum. Should map 1:1 to a Figma variant property's values.

figmaProperty.description: Matching Figma component property name when it differs from `name`.

tokens.description: Design token names this component consumes (keys from design-tokens.json). Validated to exist.

dependencies.description: Names of other components this one renders.

notes.description: Wails coupling, mocking needs, known/accepted divergence from Figma, etc.
